repo_split.description: gitignore uses whitelist-inversion (/* blocks all, !/path allows). Two repos track strictly disjoint path sets.
repo_split.rule: If a path is read-only system config, it belongs in system_repo. If a path is AI data, user config, knowledge, or installer, it belongs in bootstrap_repo.

system_repo.tracks: Build scripts and system FHS overlay -- files baked into the OCI image

bootstrap_repo.tracks: AI runtime files, knowledge graphs, user-space config, and installers -- deployed at provision time, not baked into the image

architectural_laws: USR-OVER-ETC: static config in /usr/lib/<component>.d/; /etc/ = admin overrides only
NO-MKDIR-IN-VAR: every /var/ path declared via usr/lib/tmpfiles.d/*.conf
BOUND-IMAGES: every Quadlet sidecar image symlinked in /usr/lib/bootc/bound-images.d/
BOOTC-CONTAINER-LINT: RUN bootc container lint is the final Containerfile instruction
UNIFIED-AI-REDIRECTS: MIOS_AI_ENDPOINT/MODEL/KEY target http://localhost:8080/v1; zero vendor URLs in committed files
UNPRIVILEGED-QUADLETS: every Quadlet defines User=, Group=, Delegate=yes; exceptions: mios-k3s.container, mios-ceph.container

system_repo./usr/share/mios/PACKAGES.md: SSOT for all RPM packages (fenced packages-<category> blocks)
system_repo./usr/share/mios/env.defaults: all MIOS_* variable definitions -- single definition point
system_repo./usr/lib/dracut/: dracut initramfs builder -- binaries, modules, configs
system_repo./usr/lib/systemd/system/: MiOS systemd units and drop-in overrides

bootstrap_repo./usr/share/mios/ai/vars.json: global variables index (all version pins, ports, paths)
bootstrap_repo./usr/share/mios/knowledge/: RAG knowledge graphs and agent navigation artifacts

runtime_only./var/lib/mios/ai/memory/: persistent agent memory (sqlite WAL) -- not in git
runtime_only./var/lib/mios/ai/scratch/: volatile inter-agent scratchpad (rotated daily) -- not in git
runtime_only./var/lib/mios/ai/journal.md: chronological action log (append-only) -- not in git
runtime_only./srv/ai/models/: GGUF/safetensors model weights -- not in git

endpoints.GET /v1/models: list available models; static catalog at /usr/share/mios/ai/models.json

agent_env.OPENAI_API_KEY: not-required -- local endpoint accepts any non-empty value

notes: All MIOS_AI_* vars must resolve to http://localhost:8080/v1 -- no vendor endpoints in committed files
Agent tools that accept OPENAI_BASE_URL work unmodified against this endpoint

build_pipeline.entry: Containerfile -> 08-system-files-overlay.sh -> automation/build.sh -> numbered scripts -> bootc container lint

install_surfaces.linux_fhs: install.sh via curl | bash (Total Root Merge)

day2_operations: sudo bootc upgrade && sudo systemctl reboot

core_concepts.bootc: OCI image → bootable OS, atomic updates, composefs backend
core_concepts.immutability: /usr read-only at runtime, /etc + /var mutable, composefs integrity
core_concepts.multi_surface: WSL2, Hyper-V, QEMU, bare metal, k3s nodes from single OCI image
core_concepts.security: SELinux enforcing, fapolicyd, composefs-verity, cosign signing
